description: Calibrate the GR4J hydrological model for catchment L0123001 using the 'airGR' package to maximize the Nash-Sutcliffe Efficiency (NSE). The analysis must include a warm-up period (1985-01-01 to 1985-12-31), a calibration period (1986-01-01 to 1990-12-31), and a validation period (1991-01-01 to 1995-12-31). Save the performance metrics to /home/ga/RProjects/output/catchment_metrics.csv with columns 'Calibration_NSE' and 'Validation_NSE'. Create a hydrograph comparing observed vs simulated flow for the validation period and save it to /home/ga/RProjects/output/validation_hydrograph.png. Perform the analysis in /home/ga/RProjects/catchment_analysis.R. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
